content:
# Session 22 (iter-022) — review

## Metadata
- Sorry count: **5 → 5** (global 9 → 9). No regression.
- File touched: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (14 edits, 0 builds in-lane, cold `lake build` green).
- Targets: `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (B6-succ, primary); `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural` (ii-a, NEW).
- Build: GREEN (`lean_diagnostic_messages severity=error` → `[]`).

## tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural (ii-a) — SOLVED, axiom-clean
- The planner's #1 priority; the diamond-crossing transposition naturality that blocked iters 018–021.
- Statement (Lean is MORE general than the block — arbitrary `e : A ≅ B`, fixed `P Q`):
  `(e ▷ P) ▷ Q ≪≫ σ_B = σ_A ≪≫ (e ▷ Q) ▷ P` where `σ_Y = α_{Y,P,Q} ≪≫ (Y ◁ β_{P,Q}) ≪≫ α_{Y,Q,P}⁻¹`.
- Proof (route-(b), exactly as analogist-predicted): `apply Iso.ext`; one `simp only` with the `_eq` bridges
  + `tensorObjAssoc` + hom/inv distribution + bridge cancellations telescopes everything to the canonical
  naturality of `σ` in `Y`; then
  `rw [associator_naturality_left_assoc, ← whisker_exchange_assoc, associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc]`. NO `β = id`.
- `lean_verify` (review): `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`. `_assoc` reassociated variant
  also axiom-clean.

## tensorPowAdd_assoc succ (B6) — PARTIAL (diamond crossing SOLVED; one inline sorry @3394)
The succ body was rewritten from a bare braided-coherence wall into a ~45-line verified reduction:
1. **Seam collapse.** `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eqToIso` → bare `eqToIso`; `← Iso.trans_assoc` + `eqToIso_trans`
   merges it with the inverse reindexer of `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_reindex`; `simp [tensorPow_succ, eqToIso_self]`
   collapses the self-`eqToIso`. A4 double-whisker now sits directly before `σ_B`.
2. **(ii-a) flip.** `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural_assoc` transposes A4
   `WR(WR μ_{k,m'} ▷ L) L^m''` → `WR(WR μ_{k,m'} ▷ L^m'') L`, exposing the single `ih` leg.
3. **Fold + ih.** `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans_assoc` folds the doubled leg; derived `ih2` (`ih` with trailing
   reindexer transposed via `rw [← ih]; simp`) rewrites the `ih` core; `simp only [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans,
   tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eqToIso, eqToIso_trans]` distributes + collapses trailing reindexers.
4. **Canonicalize (iii).** `apply Iso.ext` + (ii-a) `_eq`-bridge `simp only` reduces BOTH sides to pure canonical
   morphisms; the two `μ` atoms `μ_{m',m''}`, `μ_{k,m'+m''}` appear opaque in matching positions, common
   `tensorObjIso ≫ eqToIso` suffix.
5. **Partial telescope.** `simp only [← comp_whiskerRight_assoc, ← whiskerLeft_comp_assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, …]`
   collapses bridge hom-inv pairs straddling the braidings (`tio.hom ≫ tio.inv ≫ β → β`, verified).

**Remaining (iii) sorry @3394:** clean canonical morphism identity, ~6 residual `tensorObjIso` bridges/side, each
separated from its partner by an `α`/`β`. Close by: slide each bridge through adjacent `α`/`β`
(`associator_naturality_*_assoc` / `BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality` / `whisker_exchange_assoc`) until hom-inv
partners adjacent + cancel, then `hexagon_forward` + `pentagon` + `whisker_exchange` (one braiding `β_{L,L^m'}`,
SAME permutation, NO `β=id`). Failed in-lane: `coherence` (not imported), blind `simp [whisker_exchange]` (loops).

## New helpers (all axiom-clean, private mechanical utilities — no blueprint block owed)
`tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eqToIso`, `eqToIso_self`, `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural_assoc`,
`tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans_assoc`. (Same status the directive granted prior private helpers
`tensorPowAdd_reindex_fst`/`tensorPowAdd_succ`.) Present in `dag-query unmatched` (342) — listed in recommendations.

## Regression
★ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`, B5 `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`, B6-base, `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`,
`tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`, `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_reindex` — all re-`lean_verify`'d axiom-clean.
Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents` untouched, DELIVERED.

## Verification subagents (both dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter022` — 0 must-fix; 1 major. (ii-a) one-to-one + axiom-clean; `tensorPowAdd_assoc`
  not weakened, honest inline sorry; chapter adequate for (iii). Major = 2 DANGLING `\lean{}` pins
  (`…_succ_interchange` @1403, `…_succ_coherence` @1445 — decls don't exist; prover inlined). Report:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter022.md`.
- **lean-auditor** `iter022` — 0 critical / 2 major / 2 minor. No fabricated pins, no `maxHeartbeats 1e6`, no `axiom`,
  no laundered sorry; sorry @3394 honest. Major (both .lean stale section-comments, NOT proof defects):
  L731 "DEFERRED" block contradicts present `relTensorActL/R`/`relTensorProj`; L871 "tensorPowAdd … left absent"
  block contradicts the now-present `tensorPowAdd` @2202. Minor: L786 superseded-handoff dead text (83 lines);
  L3413 stale "single remaining sorry" comment. Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter022.md`.

## ⚠ sync_leanok over-strip + CORRUPTION (9th iter) — manual repair (override)
sync iter-22 (sha dd12820): removed 25 / added 1 on `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`; chapter dropped to ZERO
proof-block `\leanok`, and the `lem:sheafTensorPow_add` block @983 was corrupted to build-breaking
`\begin{proof}    lem:tensorObjUnitIso_eq, … }` (dangling label list, no `\uses{` opener → plastex
`Label '' could not be resolved` + leanblueprint depgraph `RecursionError`; this is exactly the
blueprint-doctor "Malformed annotations" finding — its 4 bare-label entries for
`lem:tensorBraiding_eq`/`lem:tensorObjUnitIso_eq`/`lem:tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq`/`lem:tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq`).
**Review REPAIRED 1 corruption + RESTORED 26 proof-block `\leanok`** (each verified clean via the exclusion
principle — all 26 are upstream of / independent of the 5 sorries; green build + spot `lean_verify` on 6 of them):
- @983: repaired `\begin{proof}` → `\begin{proof}\uses{…}` (NO `\leanok` — block covers the still-sorried
  assoc + comm constraints).
- 26 restored `\leanok` (see "Blueprint markers updated (manual)").
- 9 blocks left correctly BARE: @983 (covers sorries), @1223 `braiding_eq_id_of_invertible`, @1287
  `tensorPowAdd_comm`, @1427 `…_succ_interchange` (dangling), @1468 `…_succ_coherence` (dangling), @1518
  `tensorPowAdd_assoc`, @2385 gsemiring, @2461 gcommSemiring, @2526 gmodule (last 3 transitively depend on
  sorried assoc/comm). Durable fix is sync-side; surfaced in TO_USER + recommendations (9th iter).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` @983 `lem:sheafTensorPow_add`: repaired corruption → restored `\uses{}` opener
  (no `\leanok`; covers sorried constraints).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: restored proof-block `\leanok` (manual override; sync over-strip) on lines
  405, 613, 655, 737, 823, 855, 886, 916, 944, 1122, 1152, 1341, 1386, 1633, 1664, 1690, 1762, 1817, 1848,
  1887, 1931, 1963, 2030, 2108, 2129, 2242. All re-confirmed axiom-clean (exclusion principle + spot verify).
  @1386 `lem:tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural` is NEW this iter (ii-a delivered axiom-clean).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` @1403 `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_interchange` + @1445
  `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_coherence`: added `% NOTE` flagging the dangling `\lean{}` pin (decl inlined;
  planner to realize-or-de-pin).

## Notes (LOW)
- lean-auditor minor: stale `.lean` comments (L786 dead handoff block, L3413 stale sorry note) — cleanup for prover.
